adjudication_basis: AUTO-DRAFT (hand-verify before trusting). Each 'same' label is a class-0 role whose normalized first-def signature is unique in BOTH compiles -- a source-grounded struct-access/immediate that identifies the role independent of ig number and of the matcher's use-site feature, so it is non-circular. Generic first-defs (mr/add/li 0) are left unadjudicated rather than labeled by the matcher's own discriminator. raw_ig_baseline_correct counts labels where matched_ig == wip_ig (what trusting raw ig_idx would get); the matcher must recover the DRIFTED remainder.
raw_ig_note: Of 17 auto-labels, raw ig_idx agrees on 2; the other 15 drifted and must be recovered by first-def identity.
